post.content: Given two cells, source(x1,y1) and destination(x2, y2) in an **infinite** grid. \nFind the total no of paths with minimum no of steps between source and destination. (You can go only 4 directions at each cell).
so basically , its ( d1 + d2 ) C d1 , nCr , n chose r basically , d1 is the delta x and d2 = delta y.
basically word ladder ii without the words.
Easy problem, minimum path can only go in 2 directions, store mem in map in recursion
